parameters.jsCode:
const claudeResponse = $input.first().json; const prev = $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json; const rawText = claudeResponse.content[0].text.trim(); let estimate; try { const cleaned = rawText.replace(/^```\w*\n?/, '').replace(/\n?```$/, ''); estimate = JSON.parse(cleaned); } catch (e) { throw new Error('Claude returned invalid JSON: ' + rawText.slice(0, 300)); } const { submitter_name, submitter_email, part_name, company, quantity, material_type } = prev; const matLabel = material_type.replace(/_/g, ' '); const itemRows = estimate.line_items.map(item => ` ${item.service} ${item.detail} ${item.rate_label} $${item.cost.toFixed(2)} ` ).join('\n'); const notesRow = estimate.notes ? `

${estimate.notes}

` : ''; const companyBit = company ? ' · ' + company : ''; const emailHtml = `

B&B Manufacturing & Assembly

Your Estimate

Hi ${submitter_name},

Here is your estimate for ${part_name}${companyBit} (Qty: ${quantity}).

${itemRows}
Service Detail Rate Cost
Material (${matLabel}) estimated weight x rate x qty /lb $${estimate.material_cost.toFixed(2)}
Subtotal $${estimate.subtotal.toFixed(2)}
Markup (20%) $${estimate.markup.toFixed(2)}
Total $${estimate.total.toFixed(2)}

Estimated lead time: ${estimate.lead_time}

${notesRow}

This estimate is based on the specifications provided. Final pricing may vary upon drawing review. Quantities over 10 may qualify for volume pricing.

Reply to this email to move forward or ask questions — we're happy to help.

B&B Manufacturing and Assembly · Faribault, MN

`; return [{ json: { emailHtml, submitter_name, submitter_email, part_name, estimate } }];
